title: cola scheffleri
intro: Cola scheffleri, also known as the African cola plant, is a tropical tree native to Africa and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Sterculiaceae. The plant's bark, seeds, and roots are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cola scheffleri include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, and are often used in traditional African medicine to treat various ailments.
